stdout: {"status":"completed","message":"Aligned the global certificate with the profiled outer condition H(s)=V_0+F(s)-V_4 s^2, added the missing profile/slice and transport dependencies, removed the redundant N pbar in Z hypothesis from finite attainability while deriving it in proof, repaired the support-at-most-three dependency chain, and tightened the rounding lemma’s balancing argument with explicit interiority-backed capacity accounting.","artifacts":["/<repo-root>/CausalSmith/doc/formalization/research/exp_saturation_skew_threshold/discovery/core.json"]}

{"status":"completed","message":"Aligned the core’s saturation-law and implementable-vector classes with the boundary-valid math by widening pbar to [0,1], removing redundant interiority from def:admissible-law-class and def:implementable-vector-class, and dropping stale interior-only dependencies from the pushforward/compactness/global-certificate subgraph.
